_provenance._description: Input card is transcription-only. Copy user-provided facts faithfully; do not enrich, infer, rewrite into highlights, or add planner-generated peers/sources/topics. Mark every populated field source.

research_direction._description: Optional user-provided controls only. Leave empty unless the user explicitly specified preferred websites, domains, source packs, topics, peers, or exclusions. Planner-generated research choices belong in artifacts/research_plan.json.
